data.title: Republic Technologies Inc. Provides Bi-Weekly Update On Annual Filings
data.description: Republic Technologies Inc. shared an update regarding its management cease trade order (MCTO) in relation to the filing of its audited annual financial statements and management discussion and analysis for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The company, listed under CSE: DOCT, FSE: 7FM0, and OTCQB: DOCKF, provided details about its progress in meeting these requirements. The MCTO was issued to ensure compliance, and the company is actively working to complete the necessary filings.

data.title: LUNYEE Launches 3020 Nova CNC Router to Make Desktop CNC More Powerful and Easier to Start
data.description: Today in Hong Kong, on June 12, 2026, LUNYEE, a well-established desktop manufacturing company with over ten years in the industry, unveiled their latest product - the LUNYEE 3020 Nova CNC Router. This new desktop CNC machine boasts a 710W trim router spindle and features a significantly pre-assembled design, making it user-friendly and efficient.

data.title: Anime "KAGURABACHI"  Unveils Chihiro Rokuhira Character Visual & Character Trailer
data.description: In Tokyo on June 12, 2026, the highly anticipated Anime Kagurabachi, inspired by a popular series from Weekly Shonen Jump, released the character visual and trailer featuring Chihiro Rokuhira. Created by Takeru Hokazono, the manga Kagurabachi is a flagship title, currently being serialized.

data.title: Bitcoin's stability at current levels is surprising experts. Research indicates the floor price may not plummet as expected in past bear markets.
data.description: Recent findings from Galaxy Research indicate that the minimum price of Bitcoin during potential downturns may not reach as low levels seen in past market declines. However, the search for the new price floor is still in progress. This data suggests that Bitcoin's value may not plummet as drastically as in previous bear markets, indicating a more stable outlook for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Angel Yeast Releases 2025 Sustainability Report as Company Marks 40th Anniversary
data.description: Celebrating its 40th anniversary, Angel Yeast, a top yeast producer, unveiled the 2025 Sustainability Report to commemorate the milestone. Listed on SSE as 600298, the company highlighted its commitment to Stable Development, Strong Momentum, and Green initiatives in the report.

data.title: Breakthrough T1D Celebrates Approval of Tzield for use in Stage 3 Type 1 Diabetes in the US
data.description: In a recent development, Breakthrough T1D, a prominent worldwide organization focusing on type 1 diabetes research and advocacy, has praised the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's (FDA) decision on June 12, 2026, to authorize the use of Tzield for individuals aged 8-17. This approval comes within eight weeks of a significant event.

data.title: Trulieve Makes History As First US Cannabis Stock On NYSE
data.description: Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (NYSE: TRLV) made history by becoming the first U.S. marijuana company to be listed on a major U.S. stock exchange. TRLV stock closed lower after its debut. Trulieve shares now trade on the NYSE as TRLV, previously trading on the OTC as TCNNF and on the CSE as TRUL. Trulieve CEO Kim Rivers attributed the NYSE approval to the Trump administration's reclassification of cannabis to Schedule III for medical use. This move allowed Trulieve to separate its medical and adult-use businesses, facilitating the listing on a senior exchange.

data.title: SpaceX IPO speculation causes fluctuations in Bitcoin values, trading between $60,000–$64,000. Impact debated on July 31 odds.
data.description: Throughout the week, the price of bitcoin fluctuated between $60,000 and $64,000 amid discussions among analysts regarding the influence of SpaceX IPO speculations on cryptocurrency valuations.

data.title: US-Iran deal possible by June 30 as betting odds remain cautious. Tehran requests concessions from Lebanon, raising regional tensions.
data.description: Reports on Friday indicated that Tehran is aiming for Lebanon to make concessions as part of a larger agreement between the US and Iran. This development highlights the delicate situation in the region, with potential implications for the broader Middle East.

data.title: Anterix Inc. Reports Full Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: On June 10, 2026, in Woodland Park, New Jersey, Anterix (NASDAQ: ATEX) revealed their financial outcomes for the fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and the entire fiscal year concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Navan Stock Soars On Q1 Earnings Beat, Raised Guidance
data.description: Navan Inc. (NASDAQ: NAVN) exceeded expectations with its first-quarter results, which were released after the closing bell on Wednesday. The company reported earnings of 8 cents per share, surpassing the forecasted loss of 1 cent. Their quarterly revenue reached $220.23 million, outperforming the estimated $205.27 million and showing growth from $157.46 million. NAVN stock is in motion, making it essential to monitor the price movements closely. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Binance expands into equities, offering U.S. stocks and tokenized equities on its multi-asset platform. #financialsuperapp #TradFi
data.description: In a strategic move, Binance is expanding its platform to support various assets, including U.S. stocks, tokenized equities, and traditional finance products, as part of its goal to become a comprehensive financial super app. This shift highlights Binance's ambition to broaden its services and cater to a wider range of investment opportunities.

data.title: BIO-key gets Nasdaq non-compliance notice due to delay in filing Form 10-Q.
data.description: In recent development, it has been reported that the government's stimulus relief package has been approved, totaling at $1.9 trillion. This package includes direct payments of $1,400 to individuals earning up to $75,000 annually, with couples earning up to $150,000 receiving $2,800. Additionally, the plan extends federal unemployment benefits at $300 per week until September. Furthermore, the proposal allocates $350 billion in aid to state and local governments, $130 billion to educational institutions for reopening safely, and $160 billion for vaccine distribution and testing. This relief package aims to address the economic challenges posed by the ongoing pandemic and provide support to individuals and businesses in need.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Drops 2%, Dow Falls 950 Points As Chips Slide; Robinhood Pops
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a significant downturn with the Dow Jones index dropping by 950 points. The Nasdaq also saw a decline of 2%. This drop was largely attributed to President Trump's threats towards Iran, causing uncertainty and a negative impact on investor sentiment. Additionally, Amazon issued a warning that added to the market's unease. The chip sector also faced challenges, contributing to the overall bearish trend. However, amidst the declines, the trading platform Robinhood stood out with a notable increase in popularity.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump, Iran Comments Spark Tech Rebound; Apple, Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, Tesla Are Big Movers
data.description: Futures for the Dow Jones surged following remarks from President Trump and Iran, leading to a tech sector resurgence on Monday. Notable gains were seen in companies like Micron, Nvidia, and Sandisk. Apple, Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, and Tesla were among the major players witnessing significant movement in the market due to these developments.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Ends Higher In Recovery Move, Dow Dips; Apple Sinks On AI News
data.description: Today, the stock market saw a decline in the Dow Jones index, with the Nasdaq composite showing an increase. Tesla experienced a significant gain, while Nvidia also rose. The Nasdaq finished higher in a recovery movement, contrasting with the drop seen in the Dow. Apple faced a decrease following news related to artificial intelligence. The market signals fluctuated during the day, with the Dow declining and the Nasdaq showing growth. Tesla and Nvidia stood out with positive movements, while Apple faced challenges due to AI-related developments. The Investor's Business Daily reported on these market trends, emphasizing the mixed performance of major indices and individual stocks.

data.title: Monroe University Celebrates the Class of 2026 at Commencement
data.description: Assemblymembers Karines Reyes and Chantel Jackson gave commencement speeches at the 93rd Annual Commencement of Monroe University in Bronx, N.Y. The event took place on June 12, 2026, at Radio City. Monroe University is known for its commitment to educating first-generation and international students, and the ceremony celebrated the graduation of an important number of students.

data.title: HASA Inc. Acquires Swimming Pool Chemicals Manufacturer Bio-Dex Laboratories, Inc.
data.description: Valencia, California - In a recent press release, HASA Inc. revealed the acquisition of Bio-Dex Laboratories, Inc., a renowned business offering professional-grade water treatment solutions. HASA Inc., a prominent producer and distributor of superior water treatment products, made the announcement on June 12, 2026. This strategic move aims to bolster HASA Inc.'s market presence and broaden its portfolio. The deal signifies a significant expansion for HASA Inc. and underlines its commitment to excellence in the water treatment industry.

data.title: Traders show confidence in Bitcoin's rally to $70K, supported by bid-ask readings and RSI divergence. Key target identified.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently showing positive bid-ask readings and a bullish RSI divergence, indicating support for its recovery. Analysts are eyeing a key target of $70,000 as the cryptocurrency's potential next milestone. This positive momentum suggests growing investor confidence in Bitcoin's upward trajectory.

data.title: ROMA Green Finance Establishes Dedicated Artificial Intelligence and High-Performance Computing Infrastructure Investment Vertical
data.description: ROMA has expanded its sustainable-finance initiative by introducing a new vertical that focuses on energy-efficient, behind-the-meter-powered digital infrastructure. The company is currently reviewing a lineup of investment opportunities in the distributed, sub-50 MW AI/HPC sector. These opportunities are being assessed for feasibility, with final decisions pending diligence, definitive documentation, and approval from the board.
